description_long: This is a large, modern cargo or transport airplane with a wide fuselage and a high-mounted, swept wing configuration. The aircraft features four prominent turbofan engines mounted in pairs under each wing, and a distinctive twin vertical stabilizer tail design. The fuselage includes a visible cargo bay area with a tan-colored section, likely representing a cargo door or ramp. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage and is enclosed with multiple windows. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable and currently stowed within the fuselage.
description: A large, modern cargo airplane with swept high wings, four underwing turbofan engines, and a twin vertical stabilizer tail. The fuselage features a visible cargo bay and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the twin vertical stabilizers, four turbofan engines, and the broad, swept wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, the cargo bay area, and the wing-mounted engines.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the cockpit windows, nose, and the full wingspan with engine placement.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cargo bay and engine arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, swept configuration with moderate dihedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer with a conventional horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, not visible in current views.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows.
